name.en: Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts
name.ja: <ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>の<ruby>失<rt>しつ</rt></ruby><ruby>楽<rt>らく</rt></ruby><ruby>園<rt>えん</rt></ruby>

text.en: Thrice per turn: You can send 3 other cards of the same type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY, then you can Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand, Deck, GY, or banishment, and if you do, it is unaffected by your opponent's activated Spell/Trap effects. If you control a "Sacred Beast" monster whose original Level is 10: You can draw 2 cards. You can only use this effect of "Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的②效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：1回合最多3次，在自己的主要阶段可以发动。将此卡以外的自己手牌・场上（表侧表示）的3张种类（怪兽・魔法・陷阱）相同的卡送至墓地。然后，可将自己手牌・牌组・墓地・除外状态的1只“三幻魔”怪兽特殊召唤。以此效果特殊召唤的怪兽，不受对手发动的魔法・陷阱卡效果影响。②：自己场上存在原本等级为10的“三幻魔”怪兽的情况下可以发动。自己抽2张。
